evals.prompt: No mobile do Chatwit, quando eu abrir uma conversa e arrastar da direita para a esquerda, quero abrir uma segunda tela de detalhes igual ao app mobile do Chatwoot, mas sem tocar na lógica desktop. Reaproveite labels, participantes, status, agente, time e prioridade que já existem.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the Chatwit mobile docs first, inspects the desktop/store logic, implements the feature inside mobile-only components, preserves desktop isolation, and updates the mobile docs.

assertions.name: reads_mobile_docs_first
assertions.description: Agent reads chatwitdocs/Chatwoot-Chatwit-mobile.md before writing code
assertions.check: The agent reads the mobile documentation file before making any edits

assertions.name: no_desktop_file_modified
assertions.description: No file outside components-next/mobile/ is modified (except Dashboard.vue guards and i18n)
assertions.check: Modified files are limited to components-next/mobile/*, i18n/locale/*/mobile.json, and optionally Dashboard.vue

assertions.name: reuses_store_dispatch
assertions.description: Code uses store.dispatch with existing actions like toggleStatus, assignAgent, assignTeam, assignPriority
assertions.check: Generated code contains store.dispatch calls to existing Vuex actions, not new API calls or reimplemented logic

assertions.name: i18n_three_locales
assertions.description: New i18n keys added to en, pt, and pt_BR mobile.json files
assertions.check: All three locale files (en/mobile.json, pt/mobile.json, pt_BR/mobile.json) receive matching new keys

assertions.name: docs_updated
assertions.description: Mobile docs updated with changelog entry
assertions.check: chatwitdocs/Chatwoot-Chatwit-mobile.md receives a new changelog entry describing the change

evals.prompt: Corrija um bug do módulo mobile do Chatwit onde o settings não mostra corretamente o estado de push notifications no PWA. Não use Firebase nem invente fluxo novo; conecte o que já existe no projeto e mantenha o desktop intacto.
evals.expected_output: The agent reuses the existing Web Push/VAPID flow, changes only mobile-specific presentation or guards, adds any missing mobile i18n, and does not introduce desktop regressions.

assertions.name: uses_existing_push_helper
assertions.description: Code imports from helper/pushHelper.js instead of creating new push logic
assertions.check: Generated code imports hasPushPermissions, requestPushPermissions, or registerSubscription from pushHelper.js

assertions.name: no_firebase_reference
assertions.check: Generated code does not contain firebase, FCM, or FIREBASE references

assertions.name: only_mobile_files_changed
assertions.description: Changes limited to mobile components and mobile i18n
assertions.check: Only files under components-next/mobile/ and i18n/locale/*/mobile.json are modified

assertions.name: uses_vapid_flow
assertions.description: Push implementation uses VAPID/Web Push, not FCM
assertions.check: Code references vapidPublicKey, PushManager, or serviceWorker registration — not FCM tokens

evals.prompt: Quero que a tela mobile de uma conversa mostre detalhes do contato e atributos em um layout mais nativo, usando como referência o chatwitdocs/chatwoot-mobile-app. As informações já existem no desktop, então só conecte ao layout mobile e documente a mudança.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the React Native app only as a layout reference, reuses desktop data sources, keeps the implementation under components-next/mobile, and documents the change in the Chatwit mobile docs.

assertions.name: reuses_contact_store
assertions.description: Code uses existing contact store/getters instead of new API calls
assertions.check: Generated code uses contacts/getContact, contacts/show, or getSelectedChat for contact data

assertions.name: mobile_only_components
assertions.description: New/modified components are under components-next/mobile/ only
assertions.check: All new Vue components are created inside components-next/mobile/

assertions.name: no_react_native_logic_ported
assertions.description: No React Native patterns ported (no React hooks, no RN navigation)
assertions.check: Generated code uses Vue 3 Composition API, not React patterns

assertions.name: changelog_entry_added
assertions.check: chatwitdocs/Chatwoot-Chatwit-mobile.md has a new changelog entry for this change
